features: Upgraded 38Wh GHU 255 G4 Battery: HP 807956-001 laptop battery offers an upgraded 38Wh capacity. It is designed to be a perfect fit for your HP 255 G4, ensuring optimum performance and longevity. GHU HS04 38W Laptop Battery is tailored to fit a wide array of HP laptop models seamlessly, such as HP Pavilion, Envy laptops, 240 G4 G5, 245 G4 g5, 250 G4 G5, 255 G4 g5, and 256 G4 g5 Series.

Long-lasting Performance: This HP 807956-001 laptop replacement battery is designed to last for more than 3 hours. It ensures your HP laptop stays powered through your most demanding tasks. This high-quality, rechargeable replacement lithium-ion battery for hp hs03 battery boasts 14.8V and 2600mAh, offering robust performance and rapid charging for your device. Accredited by CE, FCC, and RoHS, it ensures maximum safety and quality standards.

Recharges for Over 500 Cycles: Our HP battery 807956-001 is not just a temporary power source. It can recharge for more than 500 cycles, making it a cost-effective and eco-friendly choice for your HP laptop. Whether you have an HP 15-ay013nr or HP 15-ba079dx, the GHU for hp HS04 battery 38W battery can support your laptop's power needs effectively.

Fast Charging and Long Lasting: HP HS03 rechargeable battery features a fast charging technology that speeds up charging time, while its high capacity ensures it lasts longer, offering you uninterrupted use of your laptop. The GHU HS04 38W ensures dependable power for your HP laptop. It's designed as an upgraded version for the hp hs03, working seamlessly with HP battery models like 807956-001 and hp 807957-001.

Certified and Guaranteed: This HP HS04 rechargeable battery has passed UL CE FCC testing, ensuring its safety and reliability. We offer free returns, so you can shop with confidence knowing that we stand behind our product. Elevate your productivity and laptop experience with the GHU HS04 38W battery. Its substantial power capacity and durability keep your HP laptop running efficiently for extended periods.
